title: monardella californica
intro: Monardella californica, also known as California mountain sage, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and is a member of the Lamiaceae family. Its flowers and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a valuable treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties also provide health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The leaves and flowers of Monardella californica can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been used in herbal remedies for centuries.
